ARTIFACT.title: Artifact
ARTIFACT.description: [gold]Retain[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Can be [gold]Fused[/gold] with other Artifacts from your hand, creating a higher-tier Artifact for free.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-ARTIFACT.title: Artifact
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-ARTIFACT.descripti: [gold]Retain[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Can be [gold]Fused[/gold] with other Artifacts from your hand, creating a higher-tier Artifact for free.
PUPPET.title: Puppet
PUPPET.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. A disposable token that deals damage. Synergizes with Puppet-related cards.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-PUPPET.title: Puppet
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-PUPPET.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. A disposable token that deals damage. Synergizes with Puppet-related cards.

WASTELAND_TOKEN.title: Wasteland Token
WASTELAND_TOKEN.description: Cannot be played. When exhausted, draws 1.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-WASTELAND_TOKEN.de: Cannot be played. When exhausted, draws 1 card.
FUSE.title: Fuse
FUSE.description: When played, you may select matching Artifacts from your hand to exhaust and combine into a higher-tier Artifact. Fusing refunds the energy cost.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-FUSE.title: Fuse
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-FUSE.description: When played, you may select matching Artifacts from your hand to exhaust and combine into a higher-tier Artifact. Fusing refunds the energy cost.
CRYSTALLIZE.title: Crystallize
CRYSTALLIZE.description: If you can't afford this card's full cost, it may be played for its [gold]Crystallize[/gold] cost instead, adding an [gold]Amulet[/gold] copy to your hand. Only the Crystallize effects activate this way.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-CRYSTALLIZE.title: Crystallize
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-CRYSTALLIZE.descri: If you can't afford this card's full cost, it may be played for its [gold]Crystallize[/gold] cost instead, adding an [gold]Amulet[/gold] copy to your hand. Only the Crystallize effects activate this way.
COUNTDOWN.title: Countdown
COUNTDOWN.description: At the start of your turn, subtract 1. When this reaches 0, the card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-COUNTDOWN.title: Countdown
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-COUNTDOWN.descript: At the start of your turn, subtract 1. When this reaches 0, the card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
LASTWORDS.title: Last Words
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-LASTWORDS.title: Last Words
SKYBOUNDART.title: Skybound Art
SKYBOUNDART.description: An ability that activates when the card's [gold]Skybound Art[/gold] gauge is greater than or equal to [gold]10[/gold]. A card's Skybound Art gauge equals the current turn number plus the number of times a card has evolved while it is your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SKYBOUNDART.title: Skybound Art
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SKYBOUNDART.descri: An ability that activates when the card's [gold]Skybound Art[/gold] gauge is greater than or equal to [gold]10[/gold]. A card's Skybound Art gauge equals the current turn number plus the number of times a card has evolved while it is in your hand.
SUPERSKYBOUNDART.title: Super Skybound Art
SUPERSKYBOUNDART.description: An ability that activates when the card's [gold]Skybound Art[/gold] gauge is greater than or equal to [gold]15[/gold]. A card's Skybound Art gauge equals the current turn number plus the number of times a card has evolved while it is your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SUPERSKYBOUNDART.d: An ability that activates when the card's [gold]Skybound Art[/gold] gauge is greater than or equal to [gold]15[/gold]. A card's Skybound Art gauge equals the current turn number plus the number of times a card has evolved while it is your hand.
EVOLUTIONPOINT.title: EP (Evolution Point)
EVOLUTIONPOINT.description: Points you spend to [gold]Evolve[/gold] followers. You start the match with [gold]2[/gold].
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-EVOLUTIONPOINT.des: Points you spend to [gold]Evolve[/gold] followers. You start the match with [gold]2[/gold].
SUPEREVOLUTIONPOINT.title: SEP (Super-Evolution Point)
SUPEREVOLUTIONPOINT.description: Points you spend to [gold]Super-Evolve[/gold] followers. You start the match with [gold]2[/gold].
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SUPEREVOLUTIONPOIN: Points you spend to [gold]Super-Evolve[/gold] followers. You start the match with [gold]2[/gold].
EVOLUTION.title: Evolution
EVOLUTION.description: Evolving a follower gives it a flat +2 bonus to damage dealt/block gained. An evolved follower can't be evolved again. You can spend an [gold]EP[/gold] to evolve a follower once per turn. You can't [gold]Evolve[/gold] and [gold]Super-Evolve[/gold] in the same turn.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-EVOLUTION.title: Evolution
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-EVOLUTION.descript: Evolving a follower gives it a flat +2 bonus to damage dealt/block gained. An evolved follower can't be evolved again. You can spend an [gold]EP[/gold] to evolve a follower once per turn. You can't [gold]Evolve[/gold] and [gold]Super-Evolve[/gold] in the same turn.
SUPEREVOLUTION.title: Super-Evolution
SUPEREVOLUTION.description: Super-evolving a follower gives it a flat +3 bonus to damage dealt/block gained and the following: — This follower can't be exhausted. Super-evolved followers are also considered [gold]Evolved[/gold]. You can spend an [gold]SEP[/gold] to super-evolve a follower once per turn. You can't [gold]Evolve[/gold] and [gold]Super-Evolve[/gold] in the same turn.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SUPEREVOLUTION.des: Super-evolving a follower gives it a flat +3 bonus to damage dealt/block gained and the following: — This follower can't be exhausted. Super-evolved followers are also considered [gold]Evolved[/gold]. You can spend an [gold]SEP[/gold] to super-evolve a follower once per turn. You can't [gold]Evolve[/gold] and [gold]Super-Evolve[/gold] in the same turn.
EVOLVE.title: Evolve
EVOLVE.description: An ability that activates when the card is [gold]evolved[/gold] or [purple]super-evolved[/purple].
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-EVOLVE.title: Evolve
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-EVOLVE.description: An ability that activates when the card is [gold]evolved[/gold] or [purple]super-evolved[/purple].
SUPEREVOLVE.title: Super-Evolve
SUPEREVOLVE.description: An ability that activates when the card is [purple]super-evolved[/purple].
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SUPEREVOLVE.title: Super-Evolve
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SUPEREVOLVE.descri: An ability that activates when the card is [purple]super-evolved[/purple].
BANE.title: Bane
BANE.description: Destroys any enemy [gold]minion[/gold] this card attacks after damage is dealt. Deals +10 damage to non-minion enemies instead.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-BANE.title: Bane
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-BANE.description: Destroys any enemy [gold]minion[/gold] this card attacks after damage is dealt. Deals +10 damage to non-minion enemies instead.
CANNOTBEEXHAUSTED.title: Cannot be Exhausted
CANNOTBEEXHAUSTED.description: This card cannot be [gold]Exhausted[/gold] by any means.
This card cannot be [gold]Exhausted[/gold] by any means.
SUMMON.title: Summon
SUMMON.description: Adds the specified card to your hand. It costs [gold]0[/gold] this turn and gains [gold]Ethereal[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
